results.notes: Stub effect_fn returns []; ETB trigger is wired correctly. Targeting system needed for full implementation.
Stub effect_fn returns []; ETB trigger is wired. Needs targeting + DESTROY emit.
Spell-cast trigger is wired with proper instant/sorcery filter; effect_fn is empty pending until-end-of-turn pump system.
Attack trigger wired; effect empty pending temp pump system for creatures-you-control filter.
ETB wired; effect empty pending targeting/multi-target counter placement.
Uses make_life_gain_trigger (helper exists despite briefing flag). Simplified: triggers on every life gain rather than first-each-turn.
Uses make_draw_trigger (helper exists). Simplified: triggers on every draw, not just second of turn.
Uses make_draw_trigger (helper exists). Simplified: triggers on every draw. Token is approximation (2/2 Homunculus, not a true copy).
ETB emits per-opponent DISCARD + LIFE_CHANGE plus self DRAW + LIFE_CHANGE. Sacrifice-as-additional-cost not enforced (cast-time gap).
Card found despite name_mismatch flag (hyphen in name). Setup implements the death-draw ability; the attack-sac-counter ability is not implemented.
Card found (hyphen). Stub ETB wired; targeting/exile-from-graveyard needed.
Custom interceptor with noncreature spell filter is wired. effect_fn empty pending until-end-of-turn pump.
Card found (hyphen). Custom enters-battlefield filter wired; effect empty pending temp pump.
Landfall trigger wired; doubles +1/+1 counters by adding (current_count) more. Enters-with-+1/+1 part of text not in setup but typically handled at ETB elsewhere.
ETB + attack triggers both wired with shared effect_fn (DRAW then DISCARD). Threshold static (P/T + deathtouch on 7+ GY) not implemented.
Card found (hyphen). Combat damage trigger creates 4 Koma's Coil tokens. Trample/ward/uncounterable handled elsewhere.
Implements the Spirit-token mode of the modal noncreature-cast trigger. Exile-and-return mode not implemented.
Card found (hyphen). Noncombat damage to opponent triggers DRAW equal to damage. Filter checks is_combat=False and source controlled by Niv.
Stub ETB wired; targeting/exile-graveyard event needed.
Stub ETB wired; targeting needed for the BOUNCE event.
Card found (apostrophe). Stub attack trigger wired; effect empty pending temp pump for other-creatures filter.
Stub death trigger wired; targeting + return-from-graveyard with mana value filter needed.
Vampire-dies filter wired with auto-trigger (no {B} pay) for both target-loses-2 and self-gains-2. Filter currently includes self-Vampire deaths and only fires on the first opponent (uses break).
No GOBLIN_CHIEFTAIN card definition exists in foundations.py. The setup function is orphaned because the card itself was never defined. Cannot wire without a target.
Stub ETB wired; library search with mana-value filter needed.
